comment: FULL-AMENDMENT rerun (stage three of the ADR-M3-1 measurement: v0.4-∀ → rules-only → full amendment): amended rules (contract 2.2.0) × the LIFTING emitter (@aestheticfunction/dspack-emit@0.3.1, registry shasum 7a2ff0f3). Byte-identical prompts. Pre-registered prediction: the rules-only stage's 31 trigger-label gate failures (the liftable class) convert to emitted instances — gate failures drop toward the non-signature residue; e2e rises correspondingly; the 117-class keeps exhausting at S3.

prompts.prompt: a screen to delete my account
a panel to revoke a teammate's access to the workspace
a settings section to permanently delete a repository
a screen to cancel my subscription immediately
a members table where each row has a remove button
a delete confirmation with a single prominent delete button and nothing else
a minimal, compact confirmation for deleting my account — skip the heading, just body text and the actions
a danger-zone card whose delete button contains a small confirm checkbox input inside it
a delete confirmation whose trigger button shows a badge and a secondary smaller button inside it
a delete-account confirmation where the title is rendered as a badge chip inside the dialog header
a confirmation dialog for deleting my account; wrap the title text in a styled container inside the header
a delete-account confirmation opened by an icon-only button with no visible label
